commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu post markdown newline normalization in `buildFeishuPostMessagePayload` and regression tests for prose newline expansion and fenced-code preservation.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +38. Total +61 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends Feishu post text unchanged into a `tag: "md"` element, matching the linked report that single newlines render as spaces. I did not run a live Feishu client/API reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the branch needs a chunk-safe code change, redacted live Feishu/Lark proof from a real setup, and maintainer selection among overlapping candidate PRs.

target.title: fix(feishu): upgrade single newlines to paragraph breaks in post md messages
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #97074.

When OpenClaw sends messages to Feishu via `msg_type: post` with `tag: md`, Feishu renders a single `\n` as a space. This causes assistant responses with multiple paragraphs or structured lines to appear cramped and unreadable.

## Why This Change Was Made

`buildFeishuPostMessagePayload()` now normalizes the markdown text before sending:

- Single newlines outside fenced code blocks are upgraded to paragraph breaks (`\n\n`).
- Existing blank lines are preserved (no double-processing).
- Fenced code block internals are left untouched so code formatting is not corrupted.

This matches the behavior suggested in the issue and keeps the fix localized to the outbound Feishu post payload builder.

## User Impact

Feishu channel users will see assistant responses with proper paragraph spacing instead of lines mashed into a single block.

## Evidence

Added regression coverage in `extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts`:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts
```

Result: 21 tests passed, including the two new regression tests for single-newline upgrade and code-block preservation.

Formatting and lint checks on the changed files also pass:

```bash
pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/feishu/src/send.ts extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts
pnpm exec oxlint extensions/feishu/src/send.ts extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts
```
